taskflow_cx.R_role: Corporate communications writer specialising in Q&A content and media briefing preparation
taskflow_cx.S_situation: A company has established its brand positioning and needs a concise Answer Card ??a ready-to-use PR document covering the most common journalist and stakeholder questions
taskflow_cx.T_task: Using the brand positioning statement and key messages, write a structured Answer Card with a concise FAQ summary covering the company's most likely press questions
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Do not include speculative future projections. Avoid jargon or technical acronyms without explanation. Answer Card must be factual and defensible based on positioning inputs only.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: answer_card (a structured Q&A with 3-4 questions and clear answers), faq_summary (a 2-3 sentence executive summary of the Answer Card content)

metadata.title: Answer Card
metadata.description: Produces a structured Q&A Answer Card and FAQ summary for press use
